dependencies: Dependence on data from external sources including customers and government/public record services
Reliance on third-party service providers for cloud-based infrastructure and critical services
Dependence on large numbers of skilled employees
Reliance on higher credit quality financial institutions for cash management
Dependence on technology vendors for cloud-based infrastructure creating single point of failure risk
risks: Data sources could withdraw or increase prices for their data
Loss of access to data due to government regulation or policy
Third-party data collection issues could prevent legal use/processing of data
Cloud provider disruption or interference would impact operations
Difficulty switching cloud providers due to lock-in risk
Attrition rate increases could decrease operating efficiency
Technology vendor providing critical services creates pricing and contract lock-in risk

regulatory_risks: Fair Credit Reporting Act regulations on consumer credit report information use
Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act regulations on nonpublic personal financial information
Drivers Privacy Protection Act prohibiting disclosure of personal information from motor vehicle records
European Union General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) compliance requirements
State insurance codes licensing requirements in all 50 states, Puerto Rico, Guam, U.S. Virgin Islands, and District of Columbia
McCarran-Ferguson Act subjecting operations to state rather than federal regulation
State antitrust and trade practice statutes enforcement
Data privacy and protection laws restricting use and disclosure of personal information
Changes in cultural and consumer attitudes favoring restrictions on information collection and sharing
Potential amendments or enactments of laws restricting access and use of personal information
State regulatory requirements for statistical data reporting by P&C insurers
Periodic examinations by state regulators of licensed advisory organization activities
U.S. government procurement laws and regulations affecting government contracts
Government contract termination rights for convenience or default
Anti-corruption laws including U.K. Bribery Act 2010 and U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act
U.S. Office of Foreign Assets Control regulations
Export controls and sanctions compliance requirements
California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) compliance
Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA) compliance
Payment Card Industry (PCI) standard compliance
Dodd Frank Wall Street Reform and Consumer Protection Act requirements
Daniel's Law compliance for judicial and law enforcement officer data protection
California Invasion of Privacy Act compliance
Potential mandatory global carbon pricing regulations
Climate-related reporting obligations
Visa and immigration policy changes

sanction_risks: U.S. Office of Foreign Assets Control sanctions compliance
Potential restrictions on repatriation of earnings from foreign operations
Export controls and sanctions affecting international operations
